steps.title: Use the recommendation
steps.content: The passage says the exhibit is essential viewing. The blank must make it a mistake to miss or ignore the exhibit, because the sentence is warning readers not to pass over something important.

steps.title: Choose the fitting verb
steps.content: A means make more complicated, B means increase or intensify, and D means put together. None fits the idea of failing to notice an exhibit that is essential viewing. The answer is C.
